isolation.flowGuidance: Flow Validator Guidance: test-observability hooks (DEV only)

assertionResults.title: Filter dropdown hides non-matching entries; Select all / Clear all work
assertionResults.reason: The executed test suite includes a passing case that explicitly validates SIGN/ECDH-only filtering and Select all/Clear all behavior.

steps.expected: Coverage includes VAL-EVENTLOG-010 behavior and passes
steps.observed: Test case 'selecting only {SIGN, ECDH} hides PING / INFO rows ... (VAL-EVENTLOG-010 / VAL-EVENTLOG-013)' passed

assertionResults.title: Count pill reflects filtered count
assertionResults.reason: A passing test in the executed suite asserts the filtered count pill value for SIGN/ECDH selection.

steps.observed: Same VAL-EVENTLOG-010/013 test passed with expectation of '2 events'

assertionResults.title: Persists across intra-session route navigation
assertionResults.reason: The test file includes and passes assertions for no-flicker remount behavior and filter persistence across unmount/remount navigation simulation.

assertionResults.title: Nonce pool balancing events surface as SYNC
assertionResults.reason: The assigned command executed only EventLogPanel.filterAndScroll tests; command output provides no explicit VAL-EVENTLOG-018 case or nonce-balancing evidence.

steps.action: Run assigned vitest file and inspect output
steps.observed: No VAL-EVENTLOG-018-labeled test or nonce-balancing-specific assertion appears in the command evidence

assertionResults.issues: Coverage gap in this command-scoped evidence: VAL-EVENTLOG-018 cannot be concluded from the executed test run.

assertionResults.title: Scroll position preserved on ingestion
assertionResults.reason: A dedicated passing test explicitly asserts scroll-anchor preservation when prepending events while scrolled off top.

steps.observed: Test 'VAL-EVENTLOG-021 — when user is scrolled off-top, prepended events do NOT shift the visible scroll anchor' passed

assertionResults.title: Filter selection persists across new event ingestion
assertionResults.reason: A dedicated passing test explicitly validates that non-matching newly ingested events stay hidden while SIGN/ECDH selection is preserved.

steps.observed: Test 'VAL-EVENTLOG-023 — filter persists across new event ingestion...' passed

frictions.description: Command-scoped evidence is limited to a single vitest file and does not include a VAL-EVENTLOG-018-labeled nonce-balancing test.
frictions.resolution: Not resolved within this assignment scope.

blockers.description: Assigned command evidence does not provide direct coverage for VAL-EVENTLOG-018.
